name: The Sexy Seventies Cafe
description:
No, this is not a place to find swinging septuagenarians.  This is a cafe
commemorating that happening decade the Seventies.  Around you are people
adorned in plaid shirts and bell-bottomed trousers.  Pictures of John Travolta,
Richard Nixon and the Bee-Gees hang on the walls.  You see what you think is a
marijuana plant growing in the corner.  To the west, you can return to Broadway
(and the real world).
